notes.message: ACFT SHOULD BE AT FL320 AS IT IS AN RESTRICTION WITH ZDV
ACFT WITHIN SECTOR 4 LANDING AT SLC SHALL BE ON THE SPANE#, JAZZZ#, or PITTT# RESPECTIVELY
Aircraft that will overfly Sector 8 (Within Sector 18) must be at FL330 in a timely manner that allows that traffic to cross the Sector 8 and Sector 7 boundary at or below FL300.
S56 arrivals routed into Sector 11 must comply while SLC is North Flow
S56 arrivals routed into Sector 11 must comply while SLC is South Flow And Entering Through The PAYSON GATE, If not through PAYSON ACFT must enter Sector 11 AOB FL330
Aircraft from Sector 40 into Sector 07 must be routed via; BLIDA.BEARR# or BLIDA.SKEES#
